name: codex-lark-plugin
description: Feishu-oriented Codex plugin for team knowledge retrieval, summaries, document diffs, and guarded document writing.

interface.shortDescription: Query and safely write Feishu project docs
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex with Feishu-style team knowledge so developers can retrieve project docs, inspect summaries, browse recent updates, compare document revisions, and explicitly create or edit documents through guarded MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Find the latest product and project docs for a team
List the most relevant docs for a project or keyword
Compare how a team document changed between two updates
Create a Feishu doc or move it into a target folder after enabling writes
